horoscope: You are giving plenty of thought to the past, dear Aries, and today, transits favor making some sense of recent musings. Patterns pop out at you now, and you might even discover a missing puzzle piece to an emotional problem or dilemma. You’re making moves more deliberately and decisively, and you can accomplish much from behind the scenes. Even so, the Moon spends the day in your creative sector, and fun or expressive pursuits are in focus and favor. Social confidence strengthens, and an improved personal outlook becomes you. Love feels warm, friendly, and even healing, or sharing your ideas and creations can be rewarding.

The Moon spends the day in your family and home sector, dear Taurus, and the need to center yourself and address your needs for comfort and safety is strong. Today's transits promote seeking comfort and nourishment through some form of retreat, such as time to yourself to reflect, process, and digest recent events. You're finding ways to use solitude and private time to your advantage and for promoting improved mental health. At the same time, today is also strong for building rapport with friends or associates. You see important patterns, and you might develop attractive, well-structured plans and designs. Straightening out a matter with a friend can be successful. Planning for future projects can be exciting, and ideas are inventive.

You're seeking nourishment through your personal interests or group and friend associations today, dear Gemini, and energies are good for this mission. You may be establishing or strengthening connections to groups or causes, or nurturing connections so they'll grow and flourish. A stronger sense of purpose and fulfillment ties in with your networking activities. However, you’re also in great shape for your practical affairs, long-term goals, or career today, especially as the day advances. You might get the chance to clear something up in your professional dealings or with your reputation. Good energy is with you for creative approaches to a work project or your career in general. Gaining a better understanding of your work or long-term goals puts you in a strong position to strategize, connect, and build a long-term plan that will serve you well.

Feeling ahead on your responsibilities is especially fulfilling and satisfying today, dear Cancer, even healing. While today’s Moon encourages predictability, you gravitate to activities that put you into contact with others and those with fewer rules and expectations. In fact, you’re in great shape for connecting and sharing. Good energy is with you for creative problem-solving and helping people understand your point of view. It can be rewarding to clarify misunderstandings. You’re also discovering new and interesting methods for accomplishing your goals.

The Moon spends the day in your sign, dear Leo, energizing you on an emotional level. You might benefit from getting away from the usual routine for emotional satisfaction and nourishment today. Learning new things or enjoying different activities can help you feel stronger and happier. Letting go of something that's been weighing you down can be fabulously healing. Your talents are in the spotlight, and people may turn to you for your soothing vibes. You might be the one to solve a problem or mystery or uncover an important truth as the day advances. Intimate matters may benefit from further thought or conversation. You can be motivated to hash out problems in close relationships related to confusing power dynamics, possessiveness, or ownership matters.

You're drawn to behind-the-scenes activities and some level of anonymity today, dear Virgo, due to today's Moon transit. Still, you can find yourself in pleasant agreement with significant others, and making connections with people is easier now. You have the opportunity to look at matters of partnering and relationships logically. In fact, today is very strong for problem-solving that gets results in a partnership. You may be putting a situation that was unfair or imbalanced behind you. You’re also well-positioned to draw up plans and focus on exciting new goals. At the same time, today holds good energy for paying closer attention to your inner longings, desires, and needs. Unwinding and detoxing can be most appealing.

Today's transits boost cooperation, gaining support, and solving problems, dear Libra. With a sincere interest in one another, relationships get a nice pick-me-up. It's a solid time to recognize the healing power of a relationship or a different perspective. You're more invested in your ability to get along with others, which can boost your connections. Still, good energy is with you for clarifying a work, duty, or health matter today. You might find a new way to perform a task or resolve a problem that improves your daily routines or wellness.

A desire to throw yourself into satisfying activities and meaningful projects today is strong, dear Scorpio. Your reputation might improve, mainly as you are clearer in your value to the world and individuals. Getting on top of your daily routines, work, and health is rewarding now, and even healing. Nurturing a routine leaves you feeling accomplished, healthy, and fulfilled. However, you’re also in great shape for sharing today. Connections are creative and inspiring. Your sense of harmony and balance is developed, and your powers of negotiation are strong.

The Moon is in the sector of the higher mind in your solar chart today, dear Sagittarius, drawing out your natural courage and your desire to explore, reach beyond your usual bounds, and learn. You can also find much satisfaction in creating and sharing. You may have warmer, fuzzier feelings in a romantic relationship. You gain tremendous emotional satisfaction and nourishment from the things you create, your hobbies, or your dating life. As well, your sense of justice stirs today, especially as the day advances. If something has been unfair or imbalanced, particularly at home or with family and friends, you’ll want to address it now. It’s a good time for problem-solving in these areas, and it’s strong for bringing more beauty and balance to your domestic world. You can be spirited and quietly inspired.

You're in good shape for opportunities surrounding family, home matters, loans, and intimate relationships today, dear Capricorn. You notice things you might miss during busier times. Observing and learning rather than jumping into action makes more sense right now, although it can also be a good time for taking action on private matters. Making things right, secure, and comfortable in your personal life is a strong draw. You’re also in good shape for feeling that you’re making real and valuable contributions to other people’s lives. You’re attracted to intellectual activities, and exchanges with others can be significant. There is excellent energy with you for solving problems, and perhaps a gently competitive feeling with your communications and personal interests.

Today's transits are warm and encouraging, dear Aquarius. Learning new things and pursuing personal interests make you happy and can even be healing at this time. You're communicating with compassion and effectiveness, while also listening and intuiting what others may need. Teaching, mentoring, and otherwise supporting others can be a theme, particularly with knowledge and advice. There's also good energy for problem-solving in business, financial, and practical affairs today. Planning, structuring, and seeing patterns come more naturally now, so take advantage! In fact, you might gain an advantage in a financial or business matter.

The Moon in your work and health sector all day encourages you to focus on service and work, not immediate reward, dear Pisces. It’s a good time to catch up on odds and ends. Tidying up your life feels great and quite satisfying. It's also a powerful time for activities that promote physical and emotional healing. Building skills or talents can be rewarding. Others tend to look to you for advice, and there can be an opportunity to see a problem from a new angle and sort it out. Energy is excellent for fixing issues and getting things up and running smoothly again.
